title: 2016年6月大学英语六级真题(第3套)

sections.title: Part I Writing
sections.directions: For this part, you are allowed 30 minutes to write a short essay on the use of robots. Try to imagine what will happen when more and more robots take the place of human beings in industry as -well as people's daily lives. You are required to write at least 150 words but no more than 200 words.

sections.title: Part IV Translation
sections.directions:
For this part you are alibied 30 minutes to translate a passage from
Chinese into English. You should write your answer on Answer Sheet 2.
sections.source: 旗袍(qipao ) 是一种雅致的中国服饰，源于中国的满族Nationality ) 。在清代，旗袍是王室女性穿着的宽松长袍。上世纪20 年代，受西方服饰影响，旗袍发生了一些变化。袖口(cuffs)变窄，袍身变短。这些变化使女性美得以充分展现。如今，旗袍经常出现在世界级的时装秀上。中国女性出席重要社交聚会时，旗袍往往是她们的首选。很多中国新娘也会选择旗袍作为结婚礼服。一些有影响的入士甚至建议将旗袍作为中国女性的民族服饰。【参考答案】【参考范文】【翻译参考译文】
